XMLDB.COMMENT: XMLDB file for Interactive book module

FIELD.NAME: intro
FIELD.COMMENT: Short book introduction text, not displayed in the book itself

FIELD.NAME: introformat
FIELD.COMMENT: Intro text format

FIELD.NAME: numbering
FIELD.COMMENT: Chapter numbering style

FIELD.NAME: markdownhtml
FIELD.COMMENT: How to deal with HTML tags in Markdown format

FIELD.NAME: contentdefault
FIELD.COMMENT: Default type for new content

TABLE.NAME: mubook_chapter
TABLE.COMMENT: Defines book chapters - only one level of nesting is allowed

FIELD.NAME: parentid
FIELD.COMMENT: Parent chapter id, null means top level - must reference the same book

FIELD.NAME: title
FIELD.COMMENT: Chapter title

FIELD.NAME: sortorder
FIELD.COMMENT: 1-based order number of chapter, unique in parent chapter or top level of each book

FIELD.NAME: originjson
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional info related to origin of chapter - such as import source, restored snapshot id, etc.

FIELD.NAME: type
FIELD.COMMENT: Content type - short internal name

FIELD.NAME: chapterid
FIELD.COMMENT: Chapter where the content is shown

FIELD.NAME: sortorder
FIELD.COMMENT: 1-based order number of chapter, unique in parent chapter or top level of each book

FIELD.NAME: data1
FIELD.COMMENT: General data

FIELD.NAME: data2
FIELD.COMMENT: General data

FIELD.NAME: data3
FIELD.COMMENT: General data

FIELD.NAME: auxint1
FIELD.COMMENT: General integer

FIELD.NAME: auxint2
FIELD.COMMENT: General integer

FIELD.NAME: auxint3
FIELD.COMMENT: General integer

FIELD.NAME: unsafetrusted
FIELD.COMMENT: NULL for safe content, for unsafe content 1 means XSS is allowed, 0 means all HTML and files are sanitised

FIELD.NAME: hidden
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 means normal users cannot see the content item, 0 means visible

FIELD.NAME: groupid
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional restriction by group, if set then only group members or users with access all groups see the content

FIELD.NAME: originjson
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional info related to origin of content - such as import source, restored snapshot id, etc.
